designSystem.name: MOSC Temp Redesign Homepage Design System
designSystem.scope: Homepage visual language and reusable UI patterns
designSystem.description: Creative-direction level design guide for replicating the homepage style in this repository. Focuses on structure, color strategy, typography, spacing, components, interaction behavior, and implementation heuristics for AI-assisted UI generation.

designIntent.northStar: A premium community-charity homepage blending sacred warmth with modern neon-glass depth.
designIntent.visualNarrative: Dark immersive hero and particle atmosphere transitions into readable, card-based sections with soft green wrappers and purple glass surfaces.
uxPriorities: Immediate visual impact above the fold
Clear event discoverability and conversion CTAs
Strong section hierarchy via vertical rail labels
Graceful fallback states when data is unavailable

corePrinciples.name: Contrast Layering
corePrinciples.guideline: Use dark immersive backgrounds for hero and strategic sections, then place content on light or translucent glass planes for readability.

corePrinciples.name: Section Rhythm
corePrinciples.guideline: Maintain large vertical breathing room (`py-16` to `py-24`) and center content in max-width containers.

corePrinciples.name: Glass System Consistency
corePrinciples.guideline: Apply a unified purple-tinted frosted glass card style across services, events, team content, and sponsor modules.

corePrinciples.name: Meaningful Color Semantics
corePrinciples.guideline: Keep icon-accent colors semantic by purpose (blue date, green time, purple location, orange calendar, gold highlights).

corePrinciples.name: Motion as Enhancement
corePrinciples.guideline: Use subtle reveal, tilt, hover lift, and glow effects; never let animation block content comprehension. Respect reduced motion.

corePrinciples.name: Media Visibility First
corePrinciples.guideline: Avoid accidental cropping for key banners and portraits unless intentional for editorial framing.

depthModel.premium: glass blur + inset highlights + gradient borders

gridAndBreakpoints.system: Tailwind default breakpoints with custom section-specific behavior
gridAndBreakpoints.mobileBehavior: Stack content vertically, preserve touch targets, reduce decorative complexity.

colorSystem.strategy: Three-layer palette: atmospheric darks, section greens, and purple-glass surfaces with semantic accent colors.

glassSurfaceTokens.usage: Primary homepage cards and detail panes

displaySerif.role: Hero-adjacent labels and high-emphasis editorial moments.

fontFamilies.titleMechanic: HomeSectionTitle splits title into lead + last-word accent gradient.

specialTextTreatments.lastWordAccent: Blue-to-purple gradient text with subtle glow.
specialTextTreatments.eyebrowLabel: Compact pill treatment, high contrast, strong tracking.

sectionPaddingY.hero: calculated with CSS vars and viewport height

componentSpacing.cardInternal: p-5 to p-12 depending card type

alignmentRules: Use centered max-width containers for section framing.
Use left alignment inside cards for metadata scanability.
Keep icon blocks fixed-size to maintain visual rhythm.

timing.premium: 0.4s to 0.8s custom easing for hero and glass effects

revealPatterns: Staggered delay via CSS custom property

accessibility.focus: Keep visible ring and clear affordances for interactive controls.

HomeSectionRail.purpose: Section framing with left rail eyebrow and right content area.
HomeSectionRail.behavior: Vertical rail on desktop, horizontal pill fallback on mobile.

HomeSectionTitle.logic: Split last word and accent it with gradient text treatment.

EyebrowPill.style: Glass-like rounded capsule with yellow mark and compact uppercase label.

HeroBrowseLinkNeon.style: Dark glass pill CTA with bright hover glow and arrow affordance.
HeroBrowseLinkNeon.usage: Use for cross-section navigation actions like 'View All' or 'Browse'.

heroSystem.mobileLayout: Stacked, full-bleed feel, reduced framing complexity.

layoutRules.upcoming: Two-column grid on large screens; stacked on small screens.
layoutRules.live: Horizontal strip with compact right detail column.

projectsBand.background: Dark translucent band over particle field.
projectsBand.cardStyle: White glass tint on dark context, rounded-3xl, colored category markers.

contactCards.style: Service-card visual language reused for consistency.
contactCards.interaction: Icon box hover scale, link color shift, polished CTA badge below.

emptyAndErrorStates.pattern: Centered fallback card with neutral icon circle, concise heading, explanatory text.
emptyAndErrorStates.surface: Use same glass-card language for fallback parity.

rules: Preserve readable line length with container padding.
Reduce decorative effects and preserve content clarity.
Keep action buttons full-height and thumb-friendly.
Maintain image containment and avoid accidental cropping for critical art.
heroSpecialHandling: Adjusted framing and simplified border/radius on mobile

implementationOrder: Apply global atmospheric base and section wrappers.
Build hero with split logic and framed slideshow.
Create reusable glass card primitive (purple gradient, blur, border, shadow).
Compose event modules using semantic icon rows and CTA chips.
Add interaction polish: hover lift, shine, reveal, and reduced-motion fallbacks.
Finalize with consistent section spacing and CTA rail links.
styleChecklist: Is the section using either transparent atmospheric base or soft green wrapper?
Is card styling aligned to the purple glass token family?
Are headings using split-accent logic where applicable?
Are metadata icons color-semantic and consistently sized?
Are hover and motion effects subtle and meaningful?
Are fallback and empty states visually integrated?
doNot: Do not use flat gray cards for major homepage sections.
Do not mix unrelated typography families arbitrarily.
Do not over-saturate all elements at once; keep hierarchy.
Do not remove semantic icon coloring in event metadata.
Do not add heavy motion without reduced-motion handling.

visual: Cohesive card family across all sections
interaction: Hover states feel alive but controlled
Navigation and section scanning remain effortless
engineering: Fallback states covered for data fetch failures
